summary: Brand Theme System testing complete. All brand color classes properly applied across 41+ frontend files. 552 brand-* class usages found. No hardcoded violet/fuchsia/purple Tailwind classes remaining. Backend API tests (9/9 passed). UI tests verified brand colors on Landing, Login, Dashboard, Kanban, and Settings pages.

Backend: PATCH /api/settings/brand updates accentColor - PASSED

Backend: GET /api/settings returns user settings - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/settings/currencies returns 10 available currencies - PASSED

Frontend: Dashboard loads with 197 brand color elements - VERIFIED
Frontend: CSS variables set correctly (primaryRGB: 168 85 247, accentRGB: 236 72 153, fontBrand: Inter) - VERIFIED

Frontend: Changing palette updates Live Preview immediately - VERIFIED
Frontend: Landing page has 63 brand color elements - VERIFIED
Frontend: Landing page CTA buttons use bg-brand-primary - VERIFIED
Frontend: Cookie banner Accept button uses brand accent - VERIFIED
Frontend: Feature cards have hover:border-brand-primary/50 - VERIFIED
Frontend: Navigation active states use text-brand-primary - VERIFIED

Code: tailwind.config.js defines brand-primary with rgb(var(--color-brand-primary-rgb) / <alpha-value>) - VERIFIED
Code: BrandThemeContext.tsx sets CSS variables on document root - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: BrandSettings.tsx correctly implements live preview by updating CSS vars locally before save
BrandThemeContext.tsx properly converts hex to RGB and sets CSS vars on document.documentElement
tailwind.config.js uses rgb(var(--color-brand-primary-rgb) / <alpha-value>) format for opacity support
index.css properly uses CSS variables for Driver.js theme and text selection
All Kanban column colors properly use brand-primary/brand-accent classes
Dashboard stat cards use brand-primary-dark/50 for icon backgrounds
Landing page badges use brand-primary-dark with opacity for subtle backgrounds
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Theme System complete. Key data-testids: brand-settings, brand-tab, primary-color-btn, accent-color-btn, brand-preview, save-brand-btn, reset-brand-btn, palette-{name}, font-{name}. CSS variables: --color-brand-primary-rgb, --color-brand-accent-rgb, --font-brand. Default colors: primary=#A855F7 (violet), accent=#EC4899 (pink). Tailwind classes: brand-primary, brand-primary-dark, brand-primary-light, brand-accent, brand-accent-dark, brand-accent-light. Backend endpoints: GET/PATCH /api/settings/brand.
